attributes.description: Snack-sized landing page for the AWS dashboard family. One section per service (EC2, Lambda, RDS, ELB, SQS, Fargate) with KPI + donut + top-5 table. Click any widget to drill into the corresponding service dashboard, pre-filtered by the entity you clicked.
attributes.title: [AWS Overview] Nico WIP

embeddableConfig.title: Top 5 Instances by state
embeddableConfig.description: Showing top 5 Instances sorted by state (impaired first). Click a instance row to open the EC2 dashboard filtered by that entity.

attributes.title: Top 5 Instances
attributes.description: Top 5 instances ranked by average CPU utilization.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 | STATS c_failed_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/StatusCheckFailed`, NULL)),         avg_cpu_pct = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/CPUUtilization`, NULL)),         max_cpu_pct = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/CPUUtilization`, NULL)),         avg_net_in_mb = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/NetworkIn`, NULL)) / 1048576 BY InstanceId | EVAL c_state_sort = CASE(c_failed_max > 0, 1, 2),        c_state      = CASE(c_failed_max > 0, "impaired", "healthy") | SORT c_state_sort ASC, avg_cpu_pct DESC NULLS LAST | LIMIT 5

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 | STATS c_failed_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/StatusCheckFailed`, NULL)),         avg_cpu_pct = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/CPUUtilization`, NULL)),         max_cpu_pct = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/CPUUtilization`, NULL)),         avg_net_in_mb = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/NetworkIn`, NULL)) / 1048576 BY InstanceId | EVAL c_state_sort = CASE(c_failed_max > 0, 1, 2),        c_state      = CASE(c_failed_max > 0, "impaired", "healthy") | SORT c_state_sort ASC, avg_cpu_pct DESC NULLS LAST | LIMIT 5

embeddableConfig.title: Instances by status (checks)
embeddableConfig.description: Share of healthy vs impaired instances based on status checks.

attributes.title: Instances by status (checks)
attributes.description: Share of healthy vs impaired instances based on status checks.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 | STATS failed_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/StatusCheckFailed`, NULL)) BY instance = InstanceId | EVAL ec2_state = CASE(failed_max > 0, "impaired", "healthy") | STATS instances = COUNT(*) BY ec2_state

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 | STATS failed_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/StatusCheckFailed`, NULL)) BY instance = InstanceId | EVAL ec2_state = CASE(failed_max > 0, "impaired", "healthy") | STATS instances = COUNT(*) BY ec2_state

embeddableConfig.description: Distinct instances seen in the current time range. Right-click to open the EC2 dashboard.

attributes.description: Distinct instances seen in the current time range.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 | STATS instances = COUNT_DISTINCT(InstanceId)
FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 | STATS instances = COUNT_DISTINCT(InstanceId)

embeddableConfig.description: Distinct InstanceId with at least one failed status check (`StatusCheckFailed.max > 0`).

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE @timestamp >= TO_DATETIME(2 * TO_LONG(TO_DATETIME(?_tstart)) - TO_LONG(TO_DATETIME(?_tend))) AND @timestamp <= TO_DATETIME(?_tend) | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 | STATS impaired = COUNT_DISTINCT(InstanceId) WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/StatusCheckFailed`, NULL) > 0| KEEP impaired

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE @timestamp >= TO_DATETIME(2 * TO_LONG(TO_DATETIME(?_tstart)) - TO_LONG(TO_DATETIME(?_tend))) AND @timestamp <= TO_DATETIME(?_tend) | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 | STATS impaired = COUNT_DISTINCT(InstanceId) WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/StatusCheckFailed`, NULL) > 0| KEEP impaired

embeddableConfig.description: Distinct running EC2 instances that never reported a failed status check across the selected time range (MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/StatusCheckFailed`, NULL)) == 0). Strict complement of the impaired KPI.

attributes.description: Distinct running EC2 instances that never reported a failed status check across the selected time range (MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/StatusCheckFailed`, NULL)) == 0). Strict complement of the impaired KPI.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp <= ?_tend | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 | STATS max_failed = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/StatusCheckFailed`, NULL)) BY InstanceId | STATS healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE max_failed == 0 | KEEP healthy

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL InstanceId = attributes.InstanceId | WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp <= ?_tend | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(InstanceId)) > 0 | STATS max_failed = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/StatusCheckFailed`, NULL)) BY InstanceId | STATS healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE max_failed == 0 | KEEP healthy

embeddableConfig.title: Top 5 Functions by errors
embeddableConfig.description: Showing top 5 functions sorted by error counts. Click a function row to open the Lambda dashboard filtered by that entity.

attributes.title: Top 5 Functions
attributes.description: Top 5 functions ranked by invocations.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL FunctionName = attributes.FunctionName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(FunctionName)) > 0 | STATS invocations = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Invocations`, NULL)), errors = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Errors`, NULL)), avg_dur_ms = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Duration`, NULL)), c_err = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Errors`, NULL)), c_thr = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Throttles`, NULL)), c_inv = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Invocations`, NULL)) BY FunctionName | EVAL c_state_sort = CASE(c_err > 0, 1, c_thr > 0, 2, c_inv > 0, 3, 4), c_state = CASE(c_err > 0, "erroring", c_thr > 0, "throttled", c_inv > 0, "healthy", "idle") | SORT c_state_sort ASC, invocations DESC NULLS LAST | LIMIT 5

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL FunctionName = attributes.FunctionName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(FunctionName)) > 0 | STATS invocations = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Invocations`, NULL)), errors = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Errors`, NULL)), avg_dur_ms = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Duration`, NULL)), c_err = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Errors`, NULL)), c_thr = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Throttles`, NULL)), c_inv = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Invocations`, NULL)) BY FunctionName | EVAL c_state_sort = CASE(c_err > 0, 1, c_thr > 0, 2, c_inv > 0, 3, 4), c_state = CASE(c_err > 0, "erroring", c_thr > 0, "throttled", c_inv > 0, "healthy", "idle") | SORT c_state_sort ASC, invocations DESC NULLS LAST | LIMIT 5

embeddableConfig.description: Distinct AWS Lambda function names seen in `metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default` over the selected time range.

attributes.description: Distinct AWS Lambda function names seen in `metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default` over the selected time range.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL FunctionName = attributes.FunctionName | WHERE @timestamp >= TO_DATETIME(2 * TO_LONG(TO_DATETIME(?_tstart)) - TO_LONG(TO_DATETIME(?_tend))) AND @timestamp <= TO_DATETIME(?_tend) | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(FunctionName)) > 0 | STATS total = COUNT_DISTINCT(FunctionName) WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart| KEEP total

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL FunctionName = attributes.FunctionName | WHERE @timestamp >= TO_DATETIME(2 * TO_LONG(TO_DATETIME(?_tstart)) - TO_LONG(TO_DATETIME(?_tend))) AND @timestamp <= TO_DATETIME(?_tend) | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(FunctionName)) > 0 | STATS total = COUNT_DISTINCT(FunctionName) WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart| KEEP total

embeddableConfig.description: Distinct functions with at least one error (`Errors.sum > 0`) in the selected time range.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL FunctionName = attributes.FunctionName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(FunctionName)) > 0 | STATS f_err = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Errors`, NULL)) BY FunctionName | STATS impaired = COUNT(*) WHERE f_err > 0| KEEP impaired

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL FunctionName = attributes.FunctionName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(FunctionName)) > 0 | STATS f_err = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Errors`, NULL)) BY FunctionName | STATS impaired = COUNT(*) WHERE f_err > 0| KEEP impaired

attributes.description: Distinct functions with at least one error (`Errors.sum > 0`) in the selected time range.

embeddableConfig.description: Distinct functions with at least one throttle (`Throttles.sum > 0`) in the selected time range.

attributes.description: Distinct functions with at least one throttle (`Throttles.sum > 0`) in the selected time range.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL FunctionName = attributes.FunctionName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(FunctionName)) > 0 | STATS f_thr = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Throttles`, NULL)) BY FunctionName | STATS pending = COUNT(*) WHERE f_thr > 0| KEEP pending

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL FunctionName = attributes.FunctionName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(FunctionName)) > 0 | STATS f_thr = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Throttles`, NULL)) BY FunctionName | STATS pending = COUNT(*) WHERE f_thr > 0| KEEP pending

embeddableConfig.title: Functions by status
embeddableConfig.description: Share of functions by health state (erroring / throttled / healthy / idle) over the selected time range.

attributes.title: Functions by status
attributes.description: Share of functions by health state (erroring / throttled / healthy / idle) over the selected time range.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL FunctionName = attributes.FunctionName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(FunctionName)) > 0 | STATS f_inv = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Invocations`, NULL)),        f_err = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Errors`, NULL)),        f_thr = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Throttles`, NULL)) BY FunctionName | EVAL lambda_state = CASE(f_err > 0, "erroring",                           f_thr > 0, "throttled",                           f_inv > 0, "healthy",                           "idle") | STATS functions = COUNT(*) BY lambda_state

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL FunctionName = attributes.FunctionName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(FunctionName)) > 0 | STATS f_inv = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Invocations`, NULL)),        f_err = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Errors`, NULL)),        f_thr = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Throttles`, NULL)) BY FunctionName | EVAL lambda_state = CASE(f_err > 0, "erroring",                           f_thr > 0, "throttled",                           f_inv > 0, "healthy",                           "idle") | STATS functions = COUNT(*) BY lambda_state

embeddableConfig.description: Functions present in metrics but with no invocations in the selected time range.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL FunctionName = attributes.FunctionName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(FunctionName)) > 0 | STATS f_inv = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Invocations`, NULL)) BY FunctionName | STATS stopped = COUNT(*) WHERE f_inv == 0 OR f_inv IS NULL| KEEP stopped

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL FunctionName = attributes.FunctionName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(FunctionName)) > 0 | STATS f_inv = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Invocations`, NULL)) BY FunctionName | STATS stopped = COUNT(*) WHERE f_inv == 0 OR f_inv IS NULL| KEEP stopped

attributes.description: Functions present in metrics but with no invocations in the selected time range.

embeddableConfig.description: Functions invoked at least once with no errors and no throttles in the selected time range.

attributes.description: Functions invoked at least once with no errors and no throttles in the selected time range.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL FunctionName = attributes.FunctionName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(FunctionName)) > 0 | STATS f_inv = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Invocations`, NULL)),        f_err = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Errors`, NULL)),        f_thr = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Throttles`, NULL)) BY FunctionName | STATS healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE f_inv > 0 AND (f_err == 0 OR f_err IS NULL) AND (f_thr == 0 OR f_thr IS NULL)| KEEP healthy

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL FunctionName = attributes.FunctionName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(FunctionName)) > 0 | STATS f_inv = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Invocations`, NULL)),        f_err = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Errors`, NULL)),        f_thr = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Throttles`, NULL)) BY FunctionName | STATS healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE f_inv > 0 AND (f_err == 0 OR f_err IS NULL) AND (f_thr == 0 OR f_thr IS NULL)| KEEP healthy

embeddableConfig.title: Top 5 DB Instances by state
embeddableConfig.description: Showing top 5 DB instances sorted by state (showing saturated and low storage first). Click a db instance row to open the RDS dashboard filtered by that entity.

attributes.title: Top 5 DB Instances
attributes.description: Top 5 db instances ranked by avg cpu %.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL DBInstanceIdentifier = attributes.DBInstanceIdentifier | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | STATS avg_cpu_pct = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL) / 100.0) * 100, avg_connections = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL)), c_cpu_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)), c_conn_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL)), c_storage_min = MIN(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL)) BY DBInstanceIdentifier | EVAL c_state_sort = CASE(c_cpu_max > 80, 1, c_storage_min < 5368709120, 2, c_conn_max == 0 OR c_conn_max IS NULL, 3, 4), c_state = CASE(c_cpu_max > 80, "saturated", c_storage_min < 5368709120, "low-storage", c_conn_max == 0 OR c_conn_max IS NULL, "idle", "healthy") | SORT c_state_sort ASC, avg_cpu_pct DESC NULLS LAST | LIMIT 5

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL DBInstanceIdentifier = attributes.DBInstanceIdentifier | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | STATS avg_cpu_pct = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL) / 100.0) * 100, avg_connections = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL)), c_cpu_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)), c_conn_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL)), c_storage_min = MIN(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL)) BY DBInstanceIdentifier | EVAL c_state_sort = CASE(c_cpu_max > 80, 1, c_storage_min < 5368709120, 2, c_conn_max == 0 OR c_conn_max IS NULL, 3, 4), c_state = CASE(c_cpu_max > 80, "saturated", c_storage_min < 5368709120, "low-storage", c_conn_max == 0 OR c_conn_max IS NULL, "idle", "healthy") | SORT c_state_sort ASC, avg_cpu_pct DESC NULLS LAST | LIMIT 5

embeddableConfig.title: Databases by status
embeddableConfig.description: Share of databases by health state (saturated / low-storage / idle / healthy) over the selected time range.

attributes.title: Databases by status
attributes.description: Share of databases by health state (saturated / low-storage / idle / healthy) over the selected time range.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL DBInstanceIdentifier = attributes.DBInstanceIdentifier | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | STATS f_cpu = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)),        f_conn = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL)),        f_storage = MIN(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL))    BY DBInstanceIdentifier | EVAL rds_state = CASE(         f_cpu > 80, "saturated",         f_storage < 5368709120, "low-storage",         f_conn == 0 OR f_conn IS NULL, "idle",         "healthy") | STATS databases = COUNT(*) BY rds_state

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL DBInstanceIdentifier = attributes.DBInstanceIdentifier | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | STATS f_cpu = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)),        f_conn = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL)),        f_storage = MIN(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL))    BY DBInstanceIdentifier | EVAL rds_state = CASE(         f_cpu > 80, "saturated",         f_storage < 5368709120, "low-storage",         f_conn == 0 OR f_conn IS NULL, "idle",         "healthy") | STATS databases = COUNT(*) BY rds_state

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL DBInstanceIdentifier = attributes.DBInstanceIdentifier | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | STATS f_cpu = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)) BY DBInstanceIdentifier | STATS saturated = COUNT(*) WHERE f_cpu > 80| KEEP saturated

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL DBInstanceIdentifier = attributes.DBInstanceIdentifier | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | STATS f_storage = MIN(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL)) BY DBInstanceIdentifier | STATS low_storage = COUNT(*) WHERE f_storage < 5368709120| KEEP low_storage

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL DBInstanceIdentifier = attributes.DBInstanceIdentifier | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | STATS f_storage = MIN(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/FreeStorageSpace`, NULL)) BY DBInstanceIdentifier | STATS low_storage = COUNT(*) WHERE f_storage < 5368709120| KEEP low_storage

attributes.description: Databases reporting zero active connections in the selected time range.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL DBInstanceIdentifier = attributes.DBInstanceIdentifier | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | STATS f_conn = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL)) BY DBInstanceIdentifier | STATS idle = COUNT(*) WHERE f_conn == 0 OR f_conn IS NULL| KEEP idle

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL DBInstanceIdentifier = attributes.DBInstanceIdentifier | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | STATS f_conn = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL)) BY DBInstanceIdentifier | STATS idle = COUNT(*) WHERE f_conn == 0 OR f_conn IS NULL| KEEP idle

embeddableConfig.description: Databases with at least one active connection and peak CPU at most 80%.

attributes.description: Databases with at least one active connection and peak CPU at most 80%.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL DBInstanceIdentifier = attributes.DBInstanceIdentifier | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | STATS f_cpu = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)),        f_conn = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL))    BY DBInstanceIdentifier | STATS healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE f_conn > 0 AND (f_cpu <= 80 OR f_cpu IS NULL)| KEEP healthy

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL DBInstanceIdentifier = attributes.DBInstanceIdentifier | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(DBInstanceIdentifier)) > 0 | STATS f_cpu = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)),        f_conn = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/RDS/DatabaseConnections`, NULL))    BY DBInstanceIdentifier | STATS healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE f_conn > 0 AND (f_cpu <= 80 OR f_cpu IS NULL)| KEEP healthy

embeddableConfig.description: Showing top 5 load balancers sorted by state, showing erroring, degraded and idle first. Click a load balancer row to open the ELB dashboard filtered by that entity.

attributes.title: Top 5 Load Balancers
attributes.description: Top 5 load balancers ranked by requests.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS requests = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL)), avg_latency_ms = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime`, NULL)) * 1000, healthy_hosts = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)), c_err = COALESCE(SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)), 0), c_rejected_count = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RejectedConnectionCount`, NULL)), c_inv = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL)) BY LoadBalancer | EVAL c_state_sort = CASE(c_err > 0, 1, c_rejected_count > 0, 2, c_inv > 0, 3, 4), c_state = CASE(c_err > 0, "erroring", c_rejected_count > 0, "rejecting-connections", c_inv > 0, "healthy", "idle") | SORT c_state_sort ASC, requests DESC NULLS LAST | LIMIT 5

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS requests = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL)), avg_latency_ms = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime`, NULL)) * 1000, healthy_hosts = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)), c_err = COALESCE(SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)), 0), c_rejected_count = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RejectedConnectionCount`, NULL)), c_inv = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL)) BY LoadBalancer | EVAL c_state_sort = CASE(c_err > 0, 1, c_rejected_count > 0, 2, c_inv > 0, 3, 4), c_state = CASE(c_err > 0, "erroring", c_rejected_count > 0, "rejecting-connections", c_inv > 0, "healthy", "idle") | SORT c_state_sort ASC, requests DESC NULLS LAST | LIMIT 5

drilldowns.label: Filter ELB dashboard by load balancer

embeddableConfig.description: Total distinct load balancers reporting metrics in the selected time range (`COUNT_DISTINCT(LoadBalancer)`).

attributes.description: Total distinct load balancers reporting metrics in the selected time range (`COUNT_DISTINCT(LoadBalancer)`).

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS load_balancers = COUNT_DISTINCT(LoadBalancer)
FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS load_balancers = COUNT_DISTINCT(LoadBalancer)

embeddableConfig.description: Load balancers with unhealthy hosts but no 5xx errors (`MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)) > 0`) — `lb_state == "degraded"` bucket.

attributes.description: Load balancers with unhealthy hosts but no 5xx errors (`MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)) > 0`) — `lb_state == "degraded"` bucket.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS healthy_n = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         unhealthy_n = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         be_5xx = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY LoadBalancer | EVAL lb_state = CASE(be_5xx > 0, "erroring", unhealthy_n > 0, "degraded", healthy_n > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS degraded = COUNT(*) WHERE lb_state == "degraded"

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS healthy_n = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         unhealthy_n = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         be_5xx = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY LoadBalancer | EVAL lb_state = CASE(be_5xx > 0, "erroring", unhealthy_n > 0, "degraded", healthy_n > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS degraded = COUNT(*) WHERE lb_state == "degraded"

embeddableConfig.title: Load balancers by health
embeddableConfig.description: Donut of load balancers grouped by overall health (healthy / degraded / unhealthy). Health derived from HealthyHostCount vs UnHealthyHostCount per LB.

attributes.title: Load balancers by health
attributes.description: Donut of load balancers grouped by overall health (healthy / degraded / unhealthy). Health derived from HealthyHostCount vs UnHealthyHostCount per LB.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS healthy = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         unhealthy = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         be_5xx = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL))        BY LoadBalancer | EVAL lb_state = CASE(     be_5xx > 0, "erroring",     unhealthy > 0, "degraded",     healthy > 0, "healthy",     "idle") | STATS lbs = COUNT(*) BY lb_state

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS healthy = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         unhealthy = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         be_5xx = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL))        BY LoadBalancer | EVAL lb_state = CASE(     be_5xx > 0, "erroring",     unhealthy > 0, "degraded",     healthy > 0, "healthy",     "idle") | STATS lbs = COUNT(*) BY lb_state

embeddableConfig.description: Load balancers with backend 5xx responses (`SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) > 0`) — same `lb_state` taxonomy as the ELB dashboard's pie.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS healthy_n = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         unhealthy_n = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         be_5xx = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY LoadBalancer | EVAL lb_state = CASE(be_5xx > 0, "erroring", unhealthy_n > 0, "degraded", healthy_n > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS erroring = COUNT(*) WHERE lb_state == "erroring"

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS healthy_n = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         unhealthy_n = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         be_5xx = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY LoadBalancer | EVAL lb_state = CASE(be_5xx > 0, "erroring", unhealthy_n > 0, "degraded", healthy_n > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS erroring = COUNT(*) WHERE lb_state == "erroring"

attributes.description: Load balancers with backend 5xx responses (`SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) > 0`) — same `lb_state` taxonomy as the ELB dashboard's pie.

embeddableConfig.description: Load balancers with healthy hosts and no errors or degraded targets (`lb_state == "healthy"` bucket).

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS healthy_n = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         unhealthy_n = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         be_5xx = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY LoadBalancer | EVAL lb_state = CASE(be_5xx > 0, "erroring", unhealthy_n > 0, "degraded", healthy_n > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE lb_state == "healthy"

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL LoadBalancer = attributes.LoadBalancer | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(LoadBalancer)) > 0 | STATS healthy_n = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         unhealthy_n = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)),         be_5xx = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)) BY LoadBalancer | EVAL lb_state = CASE(be_5xx > 0, "erroring", unhealthy_n > 0, "degraded", healthy_n > 0, "healthy", "idle") | STATS healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE lb_state == "healthy"

attributes.description: Load balancers with healthy hosts and no errors or degraded targets (`lb_state == "healthy"` bucket).

embeddableConfig.title: Top 5 Queues by state
embeddableConfig.description: Showing top 5 queues sorted by state. Click a queue row to open the SQS dashboard filtered by that entity.

attributes.title: Top 5 Queues
attributes.description: Top 5 queues ranked by visible msgs.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL QueueName = attributes.QueueName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(QueueName)) > 0 | STATS avg_visible = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`, NULL)), msgs_sent = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`, NULL)), msgs_received = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesReceived`, NULL)), c_sent = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`, NULL)), c_depth = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`, NULL)), c_oldest = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`, NULL)) BY QueueName | EVAL c_state_sort = CASE(c_oldest > 300, 1, c_depth > 1000, 2, c_sent > 0, 3, 4), c_state = CASE(c_oldest > 300, "stale", c_depth > 1000, "backlogged", c_sent > 0, "healthy", "idle") | SORT c_state_sort ASC, avg_visible DESC NULLS LAST | LIMIT 5

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL QueueName = attributes.QueueName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(QueueName)) > 0 | STATS avg_visible = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`, NULL)), msgs_sent = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`, NULL)), msgs_received = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesReceived`, NULL)), c_sent = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`, NULL)), c_depth = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`, NULL)), c_oldest = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`, NULL)) BY QueueName | EVAL c_state_sort = CASE(c_oldest > 300, 1, c_depth > 1000, 2, c_sent > 0, 3, 4), c_state = CASE(c_oldest > 300, "stale", c_depth > 1000, "backlogged", c_sent > 0, "healthy", "idle") | SORT c_state_sort ASC, avg_visible DESC NULLS LAST | LIMIT 5

attributes.title: Total queues
attributes.description: Distinct SQS queues reporting metrics in the dashboard time range.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL QueueName = attributes.QueueName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(QueueName)) > 0 | STATS total = COUNT_DISTINCT(QueueName) | KEEP total
FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL QueueName = attributes.QueueName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(QueueName)) > 0 | STATS total = COUNT_DISTINCT(QueueName) | KEEP total

embeddableConfig.title: Queues with stale messages (>5 min)
embeddableConfig.description: Number of SQS queues whose oldest message age peaked above 5 minutes — indicates consumers falling behind or DLQ-bound traffic.

attributes.title: Queues with stale messages (>5 min)

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL QueueName = attributes.QueueName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(QueueName)) > 0 | STATS oldest = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`, NULL))    BY QueueName | STATS stale = COUNT(*) WHERE oldest > 300 | KEEP stale

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL QueueName = attributes.QueueName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(QueueName)) > 0 | STATS oldest = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`, NULL))    BY QueueName | STATS stale = COUNT(*) WHERE oldest > 300 | KEEP stale

attributes.description: Number of SQS queues whose oldest message age peaked above 5 minutes — indicates consumers falling behind or DLQ-bound traffic.

embeddableConfig.title: Backlogged queues (>1000 visible)
embeddableConfig.description: Number of SQS queues whose visible message count peaked above 1000 — indicates queue depth growing faster than consumption.

attributes.title: Backlogged queues (>1000 visible)
attributes.description: Number of SQS queues whose visible message count peaked above 1000 — indicates queue depth growing faster than consumption.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL QueueName = attributes.QueueName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(QueueName)) > 0 | STATS depth = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`, NULL))    BY QueueName | STATS backlogged = COUNT(*) WHERE depth > 1000 | KEEP backlogged

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL QueueName = attributes.QueueName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(QueueName)) > 0 | STATS depth = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`, NULL))    BY QueueName | STATS backlogged = COUNT(*) WHERE depth > 1000 | KEEP backlogged

embeddableConfig.title: Queues by status
embeddableConfig.description: Share of queues by health state (erroring / throttled / healthy / idle) over the selected time range.

attributes.title: Queues by status
attributes.description: Share of queues by health state (erroring / throttled / healthy / idle) over the selected time range.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL QueueName = attributes.QueueName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(QueueName)) > 0 | STATS q_sent = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`, NULL)),         q_oldest = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`, NULL)),         q_depth = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`, NULL))    BY QueueName | EVAL sqs_state = CASE(     q_oldest > 300, "stale",     q_depth > 1000, "backlogged",     q_sent > 0, "healthy",     "idle") | STATS queues = COUNT(*) BY sqs_state

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL QueueName = attributes.QueueName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(QueueName)) > 0 | STATS q_sent = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`, NULL)),         q_oldest = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`, NULL)),         q_depth = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`, NULL))    BY QueueName | EVAL sqs_state = CASE(     q_oldest > 300, "stale",     q_depth > 1000, "backlogged",     q_sent > 0, "healthy",     "idle") | STATS queues = COUNT(*) BY sqs_state

embeddableConfig.title: Idle queues
embeddableConfig.description: Number of SQS queues that received no messages during the dashboard time range.

attributes.title: Idle queues

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL QueueName = attributes.QueueName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(QueueName)) > 0 | STATS sent = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`, NULL))    BY QueueName | STATS idle = COUNT(*) WHERE sent == 0 OR sent IS NULL | KEEP idle

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL QueueName = attributes.QueueName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(QueueName)) > 0 | STATS sent = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`, NULL))    BY QueueName | STATS idle = COUNT(*) WHERE sent == 0 OR sent IS NULL | KEEP idle

attributes.description: Number of SQS queues that received no messages during the dashboard time range.

embeddableConfig.title: Healthy queues
embeddableConfig.description: Queues that are actively producing messages, with oldest message age <=5 min and queue depth <=1000.

attributes.title: Healthy queues
attributes.description: Queues that are actively producing messages, with oldest message age <=5 min and queue depth <=1000.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL QueueName = attributes.QueueName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(QueueName)) > 0 | STATS sent = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`, NULL)),         oldest = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`, NULL)),         depth = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`, NULL))    BY QueueName | STATS healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE sent > 0                                AND (oldest IS NULL OR oldest <= 300)                                AND (depth IS NULL OR depth <= 1000) | KEEP healthy

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL QueueName = attributes.QueueName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(QueueName)) > 0 | STATS sent = SUM(CASE(attributes.stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/NumberOfMessagesSent`, NULL)),         oldest = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage`, NULL)),         depth = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/SQS/ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible`, NULL))    BY QueueName | STATS healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE sent > 0                                AND (oldest IS NULL OR oldest <= 300)                                AND (depth IS NULL OR depth <= 1000) | KEEP healthy

embeddableConfig.title: Top 5 Services by state
embeddableConfig.description: Showing top 5 services sorted by state, shwoing saturated, hot and idle first. Click a service row to open the Fargate dashboard filtered by that entity.

attributes.title: Top 5 Services
attributes.description: Top 5 services ranked by avg cpu %.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL ServiceName = attributes.ServiceName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(ServiceName)) > 0 | STATS avg_cpu_pct = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)), avg_mem_pct = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/MemoryUtilization`, NULL)), c_cpu_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)), c_mem_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/MemoryUtilization`, NULL)) BY ServiceName | EVAL c_state = CASE(c_cpu_max > 80 OR c_mem_max > 80, "saturated", c_cpu_max > 50 OR c_mem_max > 50, "hot", c_cpu_max < 5, "idle", "healthy"), c_state_sort = CASE(c_cpu_max > 80 OR c_mem_max > 80, 1, c_cpu_max > 50 OR c_mem_max > 50, 2, c_cpu_max < 5, 4, 3) | SORT c_state_sort ASC, avg_cpu_pct DESC NULLS LAST | LIMIT 5

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL ServiceName = attributes.ServiceName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(ServiceName)) > 0 | STATS avg_cpu_pct = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)), avg_mem_pct = AVG(CASE(attributes.stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/MemoryUtilization`, NULL)), c_cpu_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)), c_mem_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/MemoryUtilization`, NULL)) BY ServiceName | EVAL c_state = CASE(c_cpu_max > 80 OR c_mem_max > 80, "saturated", c_cpu_max > 50 OR c_mem_max > 50, "hot", c_cpu_max < 5, "idle", "healthy"), c_state_sort = CASE(c_cpu_max > 80 OR c_mem_max > 80, 1, c_cpu_max > 50 OR c_mem_max > 50, 2, c_cpu_max < 5, 4, 3) | SORT c_state_sort ASC, avg_cpu_pct DESC NULLS LAST | LIMIT 5

embeddableConfig.description: Distinct ECS service names seen over the dashboard time range.

attributes.description: Distinct ECS service names seen over the dashboard time range.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL ServiceName = attributes.ServiceName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(ServiceName)) > 0 | STATS total = COUNT_DISTINCT(ServiceName) | KEEP total
FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL ServiceName = attributes.ServiceName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(ServiceName)) > 0 | STATS total = COUNT_DISTINCT(ServiceName) | KEEP total

embeddableConfig.description: Services with peak CPU > 80% OR peak memory > 80%.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL ServiceName = attributes.ServiceName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(ServiceName)) > 0 | STATS cpu_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)), mem_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/MemoryUtilization`, NULL)) BY service = ServiceName | WHERE cpu_max > 80 OR mem_max > 80 | STATS saturated = COUNT(*) | KEEP saturated

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL ServiceName = attributes.ServiceName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(ServiceName)) > 0 | STATS cpu_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)), mem_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/MemoryUtilization`, NULL)) BY service = ServiceName | WHERE cpu_max > 80 OR mem_max > 80 | STATS saturated = COUNT(*) | KEEP saturated

attributes.description: Services with peak CPU > 80% OR peak memory > 80%.

embeddableConfig.description: Services with peak CPU > 50% OR peak memory > 50% (and not saturated).

attributes.description: Services with peak CPU > 50% OR peak memory > 50% (and not saturated).

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL ServiceName = attributes.ServiceName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(ServiceName)) > 0 | STATS cpu_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)), mem_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/MemoryUtilization`, NULL)) BY service = ServiceName | WHERE (cpu_max > 50 OR mem_max > 50) AND NOT (cpu_max > 80 OR mem_max > 80) | STATS hot = COUNT(*) | KEEP hot

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL ServiceName = attributes.ServiceName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(ServiceName)) > 0 | STATS cpu_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)), mem_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/MemoryUtilization`, NULL)) BY service = ServiceName | WHERE (cpu_max > 50 OR mem_max > 50) AND NOT (cpu_max > 80 OR mem_max > 80) | STATS hot = COUNT(*) | KEEP hot

attributes.title: Services by state
attributes.description: Distribution of Fargate services across saturated / hot / healthy / idle states over the dashboard time range.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL ServiceName = attributes.ServiceName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(ServiceName)) > 0 | STATS cpu_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)), mem_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/MemoryUtilization`, NULL)) BY service = ServiceName | EVAL state = CASE(cpu_max > 80 OR mem_max > 80, "saturated", cpu_max > 50 OR mem_max > 50, "hot", cpu_max < 5, "idle", "healthy") | STATS services = COUNT(*) BY state

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL ServiceName = attributes.ServiceName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(ServiceName)) > 0 | STATS cpu_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)), mem_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/MemoryUtilization`, NULL)) BY service = ServiceName | EVAL state = CASE(cpu_max > 80 OR mem_max > 80, "saturated", cpu_max > 50 OR mem_max > 50, "hot", cpu_max < 5, "idle", "healthy") | STATS services = COUNT(*) BY state

embeddableConfig.description: Services with peak CPU < 5% over the dashboard time range.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL ServiceName = attributes.ServiceName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(ServiceName)) > 0 | STATS cpu_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)), mem_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/MemoryUtilization`, NULL)) BY service = ServiceName | WHERE cpu_max < 5 AND NOT (mem_max > 50) | STATS idle = COUNT(*) | KEEP idle

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL ServiceName = attributes.ServiceName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(ServiceName)) > 0 | STATS cpu_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)), mem_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/MemoryUtilization`, NULL)) BY service = ServiceName | WHERE cpu_max < 5 AND NOT (mem_max > 50) | STATS idle = COUNT(*) | KEEP idle

attributes.description: Services with peak CPU < 5% over the dashboard time range.

embeddableConfig.description: Services that are neither saturated, hot, nor idle.

attributes.description: Services that are neither saturated, hot, nor idle.

query.esql: FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL ServiceName = attributes.ServiceName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(ServiceName)) > 0 | STATS cpu_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)), mem_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/MemoryUtilization`, NULL)) BY service = ServiceName | WHERE NOT (cpu_max > 50 OR mem_max > 50) AND NOT (cpu_max < 5) | STATS healthy = COUNT(*) | KEEP healthy

FROM "metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-default" | EVAL ServiceName = attributes.ServiceName | WHERE LENGTH(TO_STRING(ServiceName)) > 0 | STATS cpu_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/CPUUtilization`, NULL)), mem_max = MAX(CASE(attributes.stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ECS/MemoryUtilization`, NULL)) BY service = ServiceName | WHERE NOT (cpu_max > 50 OR mem_max > 50) AND NOT (cpu_max < 5) | STATS healthy = COUNT(*) | KEEP healthy
